description_long: This object consists of three irregularly shaped, polygonal pieces resembling thick cuts of steak, each with a deep reddish-brown color and subtle surface cracks. The surfaces are matte with some visible lighter streaks and cracks, suggesting a cooked exterior. The edges are faceted and angular, giving the pieces a stylized, blocky appearance rather than a naturalistic one. There are no visible grill marks, bones, or garnishes present on any of the pieces. The coloration is uniform, with only minor variations in shading and a few yellowish streaks on some sides. The overall look is that of a stylized, cooked steak, likely intended for a cartoon or game environment.
description: A group of three stylized, reddish-brown steak pieces with faceted surfaces, subtle cracks, and no visible grill marks or garnishes.
description_view_0: Three steak pieces are visible, with the largest in front showing prominent surface cracks and a matte reddish-brown finish.
description_view_1: The largest steak piece is at the back, and a yellowish streak is visible on the side of the smallest piece in the foreground.
description_view_2: Two steak pieces are most visible, both showing surface cracks and a yellowish streak on the left piece.
description_view_3: The backs of the steak pieces are shown, with smooth, unmarked surfaces and a yellowish streak on the leftmost piece.
attribute_grill_marks: Grill marks are absent on all visible surfaces.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: None; there is no visible fat marbling on any of the steak pieces.
